title: LinePack
description:
Forge Pack, Made for my friends, uploaded for public feedback.
This is still work in progress.

Feel free to send me a message on discord 
(@linechuuu) with feedback and suggestions.
body:
Modpack with a bit of everything. Made primarily for my friends and I to play on a server, but I got convinced to upload it for feedback.
Anyway, feel free to send me a message with suggestions or issues with the pack.
My Goal with this pack is to make it as content rich as I can, while making it be able to perform well on low end systems. 

TODO: Functional Serverpack, Quest trees finished, Performance increases, possibly add more mods

Mods include:
- Combat overhauls
- Quark ([https://modrinth.com/mod/quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark))
- Create and Addons 
- Ad Astra
- Applied Energistics 2
- Icarus
- Botania
- Botany Pots
